title: dichromena micrantha
intro: Dichromena micrantha, also known as small fringe sedge or dichromena, is a perennial sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dichromena micrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Dichromena micrantha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
